sqlMap.select: SELECT t.id, t.sfzh, t.xm, t.jjbh, t.ajlb, t.ajmc, t.slsj, t.sldw, t.sldwmc, t.jyaq, t.flag, t.insert_time, clcs.JDSJ AS cfrq, dic.item AS cfqk FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GMSFHM, AJBH, JDSJ, JDJG FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t1 WHERE JDSJ = ( SELECT MAX(JDSJ) FROM t_xjw_aj_clcs_jgzxb t2 WHERE t2.GMSFHM = t1.GMSFHM AND t2.AJBH = t1.AJBH ) ) clcs ON clcs.GMSFHM = t.sfzh AND clcs.AJBH = t.jjbh LEFT JOIN f_xt_ajxx_dic dic ON dic.code = clcs.JDJG WHERE t.insert_time IS NOT NULL AND t.insert_time != '' AND ( LEFT(t.insert_time, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') ) AND t.sfzh IS NOT NULL AND t.sfzh != '' AND (t.flag IS NULL OR t.flag = '0' OR t.flag = '' OR t.flag = 'null') ORDER BY t.insert_time ASC

SELECT id, sfzh, xm, jjbh, jjrqsj, bjnr, bjlx, sfdd, cljgnr, cjdw, cjdwmc, cjlb, flag, insert_time FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new WHERE insert_time IS NOT NULL AND insert_time != '' AND ( LEFT(insert_time, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') ) AND sfzh IS NOT NULL AND sfzh != '' AND (flag IS NULL OR flag = '0' OR flag = '' OR flag = 'null') ORDER BY insert_time ASC

SELECT id, departname, departcode, departtype, parentid, lingwuid, validflag, updateoperator, updatetime, addoperator, addtime, memo FROM sys_department_t_new WHERE departcode = #departcode# AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT handle_unit_code FROM p_personnel_t WHERE id = #personnelId# AND validflag > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t SET handle_unit_code = #handleUnitCode# WHERE id = #personnelId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(usercode) FROM sys_user_t WHERE departmentid = #departmentId# AND validflag > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE f_xt_xd_ajxx_new SET flag = '1' WHERE id = #id#
UPDATE f_xt_xd_jqxx_new SET flag = '1' WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT zslabel2 FROM p_personnel_t WHERE id = #personnelId# AND validflag > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_t SET zslabel2 = #zslabel2# WHERE id = #personnelId#
